Question: Evaluate the triple integral $$\iiint_{B} z \text{sin} x \text{cos} y d V$$ where $$B = \{ ( x , y , z ) | 0 \le x \le \pi , \frac{3 \pi}{2} \le y \le 2 \pi , 1 \le z \le 3 \} .$$

Consider the solid sphere $$E = \{ ( x , y , z ) | x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} \le 9 \} .$$ Write the triple integral $$\iiint_{E} f ( x , y , z ) d V$$ for an arbitrary function $$f$$ as an iterated integral. Then evaluate this triple integral with $$f ( x , y , z ) = 1 .$$ Notice that this gives the volume of a sphere using a triple integral.
Answer: $$\iiint_{E} 1 d V = \int_{x = -3}^{x = 3} \int_{y = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{9 - x^{2}}}^{y = \sqrt{9 - x^{2}}} \int_{z = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{9 - x^{2} - y^{2}}}^{z = \sqrt{9 - x^{2} - y^{2}}} 1 d z d y d x = 36 \pi .$$

Question: Write five different iterated integrals equal to the given integral $$\int_{z = 0}^{z = 4} \int_{y = 0}^{y = 4 - z} \int_{x = 0}^{x = \sqrt{y}} f ( x , y , z ) d x d y d z .$$

Find the average value of the function $$f ( x , y , z ) = x y z$$ over the cube with sides of length $$4$$ units in the first octant with one vertex at the origin and edges parallel to the coordinate axes.
